---
title: "About Me"
sidebar: false 
---

# Education

-   Industrial Engineering, Hacettepe University, Turkey, 2021 - ongoing.

# Work Experience

## Employements

1.  Colonel's Restaurant kitchen help year 2024

2.  Copita Restaurant busser year 2024

3.  Divers Delight Diver year 2023

## Internships

1.  TUSAE Continuous Improvement Intern. year 2025

# Projects

Graduation project at ESPOM.

# Competencies

R, Quarto, Git, Python.

# Hobbies

Reading books and playing video games about fantasy worlds such as warhammer 40k . Swimming, taking a walk at the park, scuba diving.

# Resume

Here is my resume: [cv](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1IC5khGFc84AlYjCDzzRNP41EOAe6XAdW/view?usp=sharing)
